title: phoradendron quadrangulare
intro: Phoradendron quadrangulare, also known as the California mistletoe or manzanita mistletoe, is a parasitic plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Phoradendron quadrangulare include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially treating conditions such as fever and rheumatism. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health issues.
